---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Markdown Instructions

Keep all Markdown files concise. Include only essential information.

## Rules

- No filler phrases ("In this document…", "As mentioned above…").
- Use short sentences and bullet points over paragraphs.
- One idea per bullet.
- Omit headings that only restate the file title.
- No decorative emoji unless they aid scannability (e.g., status icons).
- Tables only when comparing 3+ items.
- No "Additional Notes" or "Summary" sections unless the content adds new information.

## Applies To

Custom prompts, agent definitions, PBIs, PBI update comments, and any other `.md` file in this repo.
